title: RoomMeet – Instagram Automation Engine
description: API-driven platform that transforms manual Instagram DM workflows into a scalable and monetizable content pipeline.
keyImpact: Replaced manual DM workflows with structured automation
Enabled paid priority posting through Stripe integration

title: Multilingual Chat & Automation Platform
description: CRM-like chat support system that extends LINE OAs with AI translation, user segmentation, and automation workflows.
keyImpact: Automated workflows based on user segmentation

title: Survey System Frontend Architecture
description: Reusable and scalable React architecture for building schema-driven survey and form builder applications.
keyImpact: Reduced new projects' setup time from days to under 2 days
Standardized architecture across multiple survey systems
Modular, schema-driven design for easy maintenance and scalability
